csr.title: Bazaar & Blood Donation - February 14, 2026
csr.desc1: Surya Pangan organized a Bazaar & Blood Donation event as a form of care for others, coinciding with the moment of Valentine's Day.
csr.desc2: Your drop of blood means a lot to help those in need.
csr.content: Denpasar, 14 February 2026 – Coinciding with Valentine's Day, Surya Pangan organized social actions in the form of a Cheap Basic Food Bazaar and Blood Donation Activity. In collaboration with the local Blood Transfusion Unit (UTD), dozens of blood bags were collected from employees and local residents. The bazaar was enthusiastically received by residents seeking basic staples at affordable prices. This activity is part of Surya Pangan's CSR (Corporate Social Responsibility) commitment to giving a positive impact to the Balinese community.
